targets.expr:
(time() - vmware_vm_boot_timestamp_seconds{vcenter=~"$vcenter", vmmo=~"$vmmo"})
unless on()
(up{job="node", host=~"$vm"} == 1)
unless on()
(up{job="windows", host=~"$vm"} == 1)

node_memory_MemTotal_bytes{job="node", host=~"$vm"} - node_memory_MemFree_bytes{job="node", host=~"$vm"} - node_memory_Buffers_bytes{job="node", host=~"$vm"} - node_memory_Cached_bytes{job="node", host=~"$vm"} - node_memory_SReclaimable_bytes{job="node", host=~"$vm"} + node_memory_Shmem_bytes{job="node", host=~"$vm"}

panels.title: Memory - OS Breakdown vs vCenter Active

targets.expr:
(1 - (node_filesystem_avail_bytes{job="node", host=~"$vm", fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay|devtmpfs|nfs4?|cifs|fuse.*|squashfs"} / node_filesystem_size_bytes{job="node", host=~"$vm", fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay|devtmpfs|nfs4?|cifs|fuse.*|squashfs"})) * 100
or label_replace(
  (1 - (windows_logical_disk_free_bytes{job="windows", host=~"$vm", volume!~"HarddiskVolume.*|_Total"} / windows_logical_disk_size_bytes{job="windows", host=~"$vm", volume!~"HarddiskVolume.*|_Total"})) * 100,
  "mountpoint", "$1", "volume", "(.+)"
)
node_filesystem_size_bytes{job="node", host=~"$vm", fstype=~"nfs4?|cifs|fuse.*"} - node_filesystem_avail_bytes{job="node", host=~"$vm", fstype=~"nfs4?|cifs|fuse.*"}
